tool_call.name: retrieve_information
tool_call.args: {"prompt": "Extract ALL data about Netflix's \"average monthly revenue per paying membership\" or ARPU from this 10-K filing for the year ended December 31, 2020. I need the exact figures for all years and regions mentioned. Here is the filing: {{netflix_10k_2020}}"}

parsed_args.prompt: Extract ALL data about Netflix's "average monthly revenue per paying membership" or ARPU from this 10-K filing for the year ended December 31, 2020. I need the exact figures for all years and regions mentioned. Here is the filing: {{netflix_10k_2020}}

tool_output.output:
Based solely on the provided 10-K filing for the year ended December 31, 2020, here is all the data regarding Netflix's "average monthly revenue per paying membership" (ARPU), including figures for all years and regions mentioned.

### Global

| Year Ended December 31, | 2020 | 2019 | 2018 | 2020 vs. 2019 Change |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Average monthly revenue per paying membership** | **$10.91** | **$10.82** | **$10.31** | **1%** |

### By Region

**United States and Canada (UCAN)**

| Year Ended December 31, | 2020 | 2019 | 2018 | 2020 vs. 2019 Change |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Average monthly revenue per paying membership** | **$13.32** | **$12.57** | **$11.16** | **$0.75** (6%) |
| Constant currency change | | | | 6% |

**Europe, Middle East, and Africa (EMEA)**

| Year Ended December 31, | 2020 | 2019 | 2018 | 2020 vs. 2019 Change |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Average monthly revenue per paying membership** | **$10.72** | **$10.33** | **$10.45** | **$0.39** (4%) |
| Constant currency change | | | | 3% |

**Latin America (LATAM)**

| Year Ended December 31, | 2020 | 2019 | 2018 | 2020 vs. 2019 Change |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Average monthly revenue per paying membership** | **$7.45** | **$8.21** | **$8.19** | **$(0.76)** (-9%) |
| Constant currency change | | | | 8% |

**Asia-Pacific (APAC)**

| Year Ended December 31, | 2020 | 2019 | 2018 | 2020 vs. 2019 Change |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Average monthly revenue per paying membership** | **$9.12** | **$9.24** | **$9.33** | **$(0.12)** (-1%) |
| Constant currency change | | | | (1)% |

**Note on Foreign Exchange:** The filing states that for the year ended December 31, 2020, the increase in the global average monthly revenue per paying membership was a result of price changes and plan mix, partially offset by unfavorable fluctuations in foreign exchange rates.

tool_output.output:
Based solely on the provided 10-K filing for the year ended December 31, 2022, here is the extracted data regarding Netflix's "average monthly revenue per paying membership" (ARPU).

### Global
| Year | Average Monthly Revenue per Paying Membership | Change (2022 vs. 2021) |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| 2022 | $11.76 | 1% |
| 2021 | $11.67 | |
| 2020 | $10.91 | |

### By Region

**United States and Canada (UCAN)**
| Year | Average Monthly Revenue per Paying Membership | Change (2022 vs. 2021) | Constant Currency Change (2022 vs. 2021) |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| 2022 | $15.86 | 9% | 9% |
| 2021 | $14.56 | | |
| 2020 | $13.32 | | |

**Europe, Middle East, and Africa (EMEA)**
| Year | Average Monthly Revenue per Paying Membership | Change (2022 vs. 2021) | Constant Currency Change (2022 vs. 2021) |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| 2022 | $10.99 | (6)% | 6% |
| 2021 | $11.63 | | |
| 2020 | $10.72 | | |

**Latin America (LATAM)**
| Year | Average Monthly Revenue per Paying Membership | Change (2022 vs. 2021) | Constant Currency Change (2022 vs. 2021) |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| 2022 | $8.48 | 10% | 14% |
| 2021 | $7.73 | | |
| 2020 | $7.45 | | |

**Asia-Pacific (APAC)**
| Year | Average Monthly Revenue per Paying Membership | Change (2022 vs. 2021) | Constant Currency Change (2022 vs. 2021) |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| 2022 | $8.50 | (11)% | (2)% |
| 2021 | $9.56 | | |
| 2020 | $9.12 | | |

**Note:** The filing explains that the constant currency information is provided to exclude the effect of foreign currency rate fluctuations. For the year ended December 31, 2022, the company notes that revenues would have been approximately $1,773 million higher had foreign currency exchange rates remained constant with those for the year ended December 31, 2021.

### Global (Consolidated)

| :--- | :--- | :--- |

| **2022** | **$11.76** | |
| **2021** | **$11.67** | |

### United States and Canada (UCAN)
| Year Ended December 31, | Average Monthly Revenue per Paying Membership | % Change | Constant Currency Change |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **2023** | **$16.28** | **3%** | **3%** |
| **2022** | **$15.86** | | |
| **2021** | **$14.56** | | |

### Europe, Middle East, and Africa (EMEA)
| Year Ended December 31, | Average Monthly Revenue per Paying Membership | % Change | Constant Currency Change |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **2023** | **$10.87** | **(1)%** | **(1)%** |
| **2022** | **$10.99** | | |
| **2021** | **$11.63** | | |

### Latin America (LATAM)
| Year Ended December 31, | Average Monthly Revenue per Paying Membership | % Change | Constant Currency Change |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **2023** | **$8.66** | **2%** | **10%** |
| **2022** | **$8.48** | | |
| **2021** | **$7.73** | | |

### Asia-Pacific (APAC)
| Year Ended December 31, | Average Monthly Revenue per Paying Membership | % Change | Constant Currency Change |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **2023** | **$7.64** | **(10)%** | **(6)%** |
| **2022** | **$8.50** | | |
| **2021** | **$9.56** | | |

**Source:** The tables above are found in the "Results of Operations" section under the "Streaming Revenues" subsection, and in **Note 2 (Revenue Recognition)** in the notes to the consolidated financial statements.
